name: Mail
description: Full-featured Email plugin for Hecos. Send, receive, search and manage emails via SMTP/IMAP. Integrates with the Contacts plugin for address lookup. Reads credentials from the user profile.

commands.send_email: Sends an email to one or more recipients.
commands.read_inbox: Reads messages from a mail folder (inbox, sent, drafts, trash).
commands.search_emails: Searches emails by keyword, sender or subject.
commands.forward_email: Forwards an email to other recipients.
commands.move_email: Moves an email to another folder.
commands.sync_inbox: Forces a sync/refresh of the inbox.
commands.get_email_addresses_for_contact: Returns email addresses of a contact from the address book.

function.name: MAIL__send_email
function.description: Sends an email. Use when the user says 'manda una mail a X', 'invia una email a Y', 'scrivi una email', 'send an email to Z'.

to.description: Recipient email address(es), comma-separated. Can also be a contact name (will be resolved via address book).

is_html.description: Whether the body is HTML. Default: false.

function.name: MAIL__read_inbox
function.description: Reads email messages from a folder. Use when the user asks 'fammi vedere le mail', 'controlla la posta', 'quante mail ho', 'show my inbox', 'check my email'.

folder.description: Folder to read: INBOX, SENT, DRAFTS, TRASH, STARRED. Default: INBOX.

limit.description: Max number of messages to return. Default: 10.

unread_only.description: If true, returns only unread messages. Default: false.

function.name: MAIL__search_emails
function.description: Searches emails by keyword, sender or subject. Use when the user says 'cerca la mail di X', 'trova email con oggetto Y', 'search for emails about Z'.

query.description: Search query (keyword, sender name/email, or subject fragment).

folder.description: Folder to search in. Default: INBOX.

function.name: MAIL__reply_email
function.description: Replies to an email. Use when the user says 'rispondi a questa mail', 'reply to the email from X'.

message_id.description: ID of the message to reply to.

reply_all.description: If true, replies to all recipients. Default: false.

function.name: MAIL__forward_email
function.description: Forwards an email to one or more recipients.

message_id.description: ID of the message to forward.

body.description: Optional additional text to prepend before the forwarded message.

function.name: MAIL__delete_email
function.description: Deletes or moves an email to trash.

message_id.description: ID of the message to delete.

permanent.description: If true, permanently deletes. If false (default), moves to trash.

function.name: MAIL__get_email_addresses_for_contact
function.description: Looks up email addresses for a contact in the address book. Use when the user wants to email someone by name.

name.description: Contact name or display name to look up.

function.name: MAIL__sync_inbox
function.description: Forces a sync of the inbox from the mail server.
